field.label: Process Tag
field.help: IS-IS routing process identifier (e.g. 1 or a descriptive word). Must match across all routers in the same domain if you use multiple instances.

field.label: NET Address
field.help: Network Entity Title in NSAP format. Example: 49.0001.1921.6800.1001.00 — where 49=AFI, 0001=area, middle bytes=router-id, 00=NSEL.

field.label: IS Type
field.help: Router level participation. Level-1 = intra-area only; Level-2 = inter-area/backbone; Level-1-2 = both (default).

field.label: Metric Style
field.help: Wide metrics support up to 16777215; narrow is limited to 63. Use Wide unless you need compatibility with legacy routers.

field.label: Log Adjacency Changes
field.help: Log IS-IS adjacency state changes to syslog.

field.label: Purge Originator
field.help: Add Purge Originator Identification TLV (RFC 6232) to purge PDUs generated by this router.

field.label: SPF Delay (ms)
field.help: Minimum delay in milliseconds before running SPF after a topology change. Leave empty for default (0).

field.label: Domain Auth Mode
field.help: Authentication method applied to the entire IS-IS domain (area and domain passwords). Leave empty to disable.

field.label: Domain Auth Password
field.help: Password used for domain-wide authentication. Applied to both area and domain passwords.
